column1: # UK Import Duty Calculator - Tab 2: Duty Calculator
# To use: Import this into Google Sheets or Excel
# Formulas are documented in comments starting with # FORMULA:
# FORMULA: Import VAT Base =CIF + Duty Amount
# FORMULA: Import VAT Amount =Import VAT Base * VAT Rate
# FORMULA: Total Landed Cost =CIF + Duty Amount + Import VAT Amount
# Copy these formulas when building the Google Sheet:
# Cell C2 (Country of Origin): [Dropdown list of countries]
# Conditional formatting: Green if K2 shows preferential rate
